title: festuca linneana
intro: Festuca linneana, also known as Linnen's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Festuca linneana is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Festuca linneana can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
